description: Create the pipeline modules: pipeline.py (generate_pro), extended.py (generate_extended_video + generate_infinite_flow), and storyboard.py (run_storyboard + script decomposer). These are the high-level orchestration functions.
steps: Create ltx_pro/pipeline.py: Extract generate_pro() function (lines 5735-6977) and SVIProContext class (line 3473). This is the core two-pass generation pipeline. Import from ltx_pro.vram, ltx_pro.config, ltx_pro.utils, ltx_pro.lora, ltx_pro.character, ltx_pro.prompt_architect, ltx_pro.vision_describe as needed. The function references many globals - keep the globals().get() pattern for config values that come from the notebook @param cells. Include __all__ export list.

Create ltx_pro/extended.py: Extract FlowState dataclass (line 2106), InfiniteFlowConfig dataclass (line 2120), generate_extended_video() function (lines 6978-7377), generate_infinite_flow() function (lines 7378-7500). Import from ltx_pro.pipeline (generate_pro), ltx_pro.overlap, ltx_pro.character, ltx_pro.quality, ltx_pro.motion, ltx_pro.color, ltx_pro.audio, ltx_pro.export. Include __all__ export list.

Create ltx_pro/storyboard.py: Extract run_storyboard() function (lines 7572-8160), decompose_script_to_scenes() function (line 4921), print_scene_breakdown() (line 5139), generate_sora_json() (line 5169), extract_character_profiles_from_script() (line 4868), and the _CAMERA_ACTION_MAP, _QUALITY_PROMPTS, _STYLE_PROMPTS lookup dicts used by the decomposer. Import from ltx_pro.pipeline, ltx_pro.config, ltx_pro.character, ltx_pro.overlap, ltx_pro.export. Include __all__ export list.
Ensure all modules pass python3 -m py_compile. Guard heavy imports (torch, comfy nodes, etc.).
Run verification: find ltx_pro -name '*.py' -exec python3 -m py_compile {} \;
acceptance_criteria: ltx_pro/pipeline.py contains generate_pro() with full phase documentation and SVIProContext with __all__
ltx_pro/extended.py contains FlowState, InfiniteFlowConfig, generate_extended_video(), generate_infinite_flow() with __all__
ltx_pro/storyboard.py contains run_storyboard(), decompose_script_to_scenes(), print_scene_breakdown(), generate_sora_json() with __all__
All three files pass python3 -m py_compile
All public functions have docstrings preserving the existing documentation
